content.speakerText: Hey, can you hear me okay? The audio's a bit crackly.
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你能听清吗？声音有点沙沙的。

options.text: I can't hear you at all. Please hang up and call again.
Yeah, I can hear you, but it's a little fuzzy. Try turning down your mic gain.
The sound is perfect! You should turn up your volume.
I'm not sure. Maybe you should change your microphone brand.

content.explanation: 正确答案准确回应了音频问题并提供了具体解决方案（调低麦克风增益），符合场景中的专业沟通习惯。选项1过于极端，选项3与问题矛盾，选项4建议更换设备不切实际，属于无效建议。

content.speakerText: Your video's frozen—can you check your camera?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的视频卡住了，能检查下摄像头吗？

options.text: I don't know how to use a camera.
Oops, sorry! My camera's off—I'll turn it on now.
I'll restart my computer in five minutes.

content.explanation: 正确答案直接承认问题并立即采取行动，符合高效沟通原则。选项1推卸责任，选项3转移问题到屏幕，选项4拖延处理，都不符合及时排查的场景要求。

content.speakerText: I'm experiencing lag during the call—my video keeps buffering.
content.speakerTextCn: 我在通话中遇到卡顿，视频一直在缓冲。

options.text: That's normal. Just wait it out.
Try switching to a wired connection or closing unused apps.
You should buy a new camera.
I can't help you with that.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供两个实用解决方案（切换有线连接、关闭应用），符合技术问题处理逻辑。选项1消极应对，选项3错误归因于摄像头，选项4拒绝协助，均不符合积极解决问题的场景目标。

content.template: I can hear you, but it's a little ___—try turning down your mic gain.
content.hint: 描述音频不清晰的常用词
content.knowledgePoint: 描述音频质量问题的高频词汇

content.template: My camera's on, but maybe my ___ is low. Let me close some tabs.
content.hint: 影响视频流畅度的网络关键指标
content.knowledgePoint: 网络性能相关核心术语

content.template: Let me ___ to mobile data—this Wi-Fi is too slow.
content.hint: 表示切换网络连接的动词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 网络切换的惯用动词搭配

content.speakerText: Hey, can you hear me okay? The audio's a bit crackly.
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你能听清吗？声音有点沙沙的。
expectedAnswers: I can hear you, but it’s a bit fuzzy. Can you lower your mic gain?
The audio is a little unclear—maybe try turning down your input volume?
I'm hearing you, but there's some background noise. Could you check your mic settings?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否识别并回应了音频问题
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当（如fuzzy, mic gain）
表达自然度：符合日常口语习惯，不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了audio/fuzzy/mic gain等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Your video's frozen—can you check your camera?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的视频卡住了，能检查下摄像头吗？
expectedAnswers: Sorry! My camera was off—I just turned it on.
It's on, but my internet's slow. I'm closing some tabs to free up bandwidth.
I'll restart my camera app right away.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动排查并回应视频问题
语言准确性：使用了camera/bandwidth/turn on等正确术语
表达自然度：语气礼貌，有行动导向
关键词覆盖：包含camera, frozen, bandwidth, turn on等核心词

content.speakerText: The call keeps dropping—what should I do?
content.speakerTextCn: 通话总是断线，我该怎么办？
expectedAnswers: Try restarting your router—it often fixes connection drops.
Switch to a stronger Wi-Fi network or use mobile data instead.
Make sure no other devices are using a lot of bandwidth right now.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否提供可行的解决方案
语言准确性：使用了router, bandwidth, switch, mobile data等术语
表达自然度：语句流畅，符合技术支持对话风格
关键词覆盖：包含connection, drop, bandwidth, switch等场景关键词
